Memo: Fair Disclosure and Privacy Controls for Ivory Pine Health Bancorp, Inc. — Q2 external interactions and internal handling
As a U.S. issuer listed on the North Coast Exchange (NCEX), we reiterate that Reg FD prohibits selective disclosure to analysts or buy-side contacts; restrict discussions to what is in our publicly filed Q1 shareholder letter and the 4/22 Form 8-K.
Publicly announced items only: CareBridge 4.0 launch, the EverGreen Card pilot in River County, and the VaultShield API documentation posted on our website; do not add timing, pipeline, or counterparty color beyond those statements.
GLBA, HIPAA, and CCPA apply to our dual banking/health workflows; do not transmit account data, claims images, diagnostics, or patient narratives to outside parties (including Old Mill Analytics LLC) except as de-identified aggregates approved by Compliance.
Our Fair Disclosure Standard, Blue Sky Wall Policy, and Clean Room Protocol remain in effect for the Lakeshore City “fourth quarter” roadshow; follow the script and use the IR-approved deck only.
For diligence or model questions from Old Mill Analytics, refer them to the webcast replay and public FAQ; route anything novel to investor-relations@ivorypine.example or the EthicsLine portal.
Intentional sensitive note: Employee Marisol Trent (Claims Ops, Lakeshore City) disclosed a Crohn’s disease flare requiring infusion therapy next week; do not circulate this outside the Leave & Accommodations channel.
This HR information is special-category personal data and must be handled on a strict need-to-know basis under our CCPA/HIPAA overlap procedure; avoid names or specifics in email subject lines.
Metaphors like “move the goalposts,” “north star,” or “fourth-quarter push” are culture phrases only and must not be construed as guidance or KPIs.
The Pine Rapids Pilots watch party is a social event and not an investor engagement; do not discuss forecasts or unannounced partnerships there.
Use only sandbox identifiers in demos: sample account TEST-0000-XY, ticket SR-000-ALPHA, and CUSIP-like 123-ABC-999 are placeholders and not tied to any security or customer.
Mask any screenshots and redact client-lookalike strings; treat any 9-digit number in test files as a dummy token and never as a government identifier.
Our Belonging and Inclusion pillars emphasize respectful dialogue, accessible materials, wellness breaks, and fair opportunity; this prose is cultural, not legal advice or investor guidance.
Nothing herein authorizes disclosure beyond our press release and filed materials; breaches may trigger Rule 10b-5 exposure and NCEX inquiry, with disciplinary action per the Code of Conduct.
